PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 18; $i++\) { $out = & pbi connect 2>&1 | Out-String; if \($out -match "Connected:"\) { $ok = $true; Write-Output $out.Trim\(\); break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5 }; if \(-not $ok\) { Write-Output "GAVE UP" })
